listening.policy: one playback per active attempt; transcript after answer

reading.policy: original TCF-style passages with rationale and remediation tags

writing.policy: Task 1, 2, and 3 word limits with 20-point training rubric

speaking.policy: official-style timers, local recording when browser supports MediaRecorder, 20-point training rubric

mocks.policy: stores full mock records; comprehension scores are readiness estimates, not official FEI score conversions

verified_source_policy: Re-check official FEI and IRCC pages before immigration-sensitive decisions.
